qnaData.stem: A patient visited OPD with complain of retracted nipple of left breast. She has the history of this condition for past 1 year. On examination enlarged left axillary lymph node was found. On mammography a large, jagged opacity was also seen. a) The patient is suffering from which condition? b) What is the cause of retracted nipple in this case? c) Describe the gross anatomy of breast. Draw well labeled diagram. d) Describe the Lymphatic drainage of the breast. Draw well labeled diagram. (1+1+3+3=8)

An old, aged patient present with swelling in the upper part of thigh. On examination it was found that it lies inferolateral to pubic tubercle and is tender on palpation. On coughing, the mass increase in size. a) The patient is suffering from which condition? b) Describe the boundaries of the femoral triangle where the mass lies. c) Describe the formation of the femoral sheath and its content. Draw well labeled diagram. d) Describe the boundaries of femoral canal. What is its clinical significance? (1+2+2+2=7)
